notes:
Release 1.8.0

macOS: na primeira execução, clique com o botão direito no app e escolha Abrir.
Windows: na primeira execução, o SmartScreen pode exibir aviso - clique em "Mais informações" e "Executar mesmo assim".
Linux: a instalação pode solicitar sua senha para o gerenciador de pacotes.


## Alterações

- feat: update app version to 1.8.0 and disable debug mode in BuildConfig
- feat: implement parallel download handling and progress tracking for diff analysis
- feat: add onToggleCommentSelection callback to improve comment selection handling
- feat: update app version to 1.7.9 and refactor tab handling in ReviewWorkspacesScreen for improved performance
- feat: add CommentCodeContextAnchorTest and refactor comment anchor handling for improved context management
- feat: add CommentCodeContextAnchorTest and refactor comment anchor handling for improved context management
- feat: implement redundant AI issue heuristics to improve issue filtering in analysis
- feat: add replacement pair markers to diff text builder for improved semantic analysis
- feat: add model recommendation heuristics for AI code review and enhance UI feedback for analysis results
- feat: refactor layout in ReviewWorkspaceScreen for improved UI consistency and spacing
- feat: update reviewer guidance to prohibit praise and validation issues based on context
- feat: enhance aura effects in AiReviewPanel and AuraPulseContainer with new padding and animation parameters
- feat: implement fetchPrReviewSnapshot use case and add refresh button for pull request status
- feat: refactor layout and styling in AuraPulseContainer, DiffFilesPanel, and ReviewWorkspaceScreen for improved UI consistency
- feat: enhance AiReviewPanel and AuraPulseContainer with improved layout and animation effects
- feat: enhance batch processing with retry logic and waiting state in analysis steps
- feat: add FILE_HEADER type to DiffLineType and update related components for improved diff handling
- chore: bump version to 1.7.6 and implement scroll to next file after review functionality
- feat: add file navigation functionality to DiffFileDialog and update related UI components
- feat: add file navigation functionality to DiffFileDialog and update related UI components
- feat: add remote thread inline comments limit and enhance reply functionality
- fix: update success color in InstallReadyContent and bump version to 1.7.3
- fix: update success color in themes and adjust aura pulse duration
- chore: bump version to 1.7.1 with patch update
- feat: enhance file review functionality with reviewed file tracking and UI updates
- feat: implement GroupDiffLinesByFileUseCase and refactor diff line grouping logic
- feat: refactor aura pulse logic into separate component and enhance update confirmation dialog
- feat: implement diff anchor triage logic and enhance comment handling for unanchored threads
- feat: add attached context block to code review prompts for enhanced analysis
- feat: add reviewer instructions input field and enhance AI analysis prompts
- feat: introduce AI review scope actions and diff summary sections for enhanced analysis
- feat: update version to 1.6.1, enable debug mode, and add batch progress calculation
- refactor: disable debug mode and simplify onClick handler in countdown indicator
